docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY HARATANI LEA AS TO DEFENDANT BARTELLINI FRED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARATANI LEA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARTELLINI FRED $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $64.98 INTEREST, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $672.98, AWARD FOR PLTF FOR $800 RETURN OF DEPOSIT +$200 PU NITIVE DAMAGES W/$400 CREDIT FOR CHECK TENDERED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BARTELLINI FRED
